response.justification: Despite a strong full-stack and open-source background, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems beyond a brief role at National Instruments 10 years ago; there is no evidence of modern C++/STL development, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or cloud-based industrial platforms required for the role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with modern JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystems
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to build distributed, event-driven systems and mentor teams
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ work in the last 9+ years
Absence of industrial automation, IoT protocols, or IEC 62443 security experience
Lacks demonstrable expertise in C++ concurrency, STL, or on-prem/cloud industrial platforms
